allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require.resolve\('langchain/package.json'\); const pkg = require\(p\); console.log\(pkg.version\);")
Bash(node -e "try { require.resolve\('@langchain/community/vectorstores/memory'\); console.log\('OK community'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('NOT FOUND community'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('langchain/package.json'\); const exports = pkg.exports; const keys = Object.keys\(exports\).filter\(k => k.includes\('vector'\) || k.includes\('memory'\) || k.includes\('text_splitter'\) || k.includes\('splitter'\)\); console.log\(keys\);")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('langchain/package.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(pkg.exports\); keys.forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('@langchain/core/package.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(pkg.exports\).filter\(k => k.includes\('vector'\) || k.includes\('splitter'\) || k.includes\('memory'\)\); keys.forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('@langchain/textsplitters/package.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(pkg.exports\); keys.forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('@langchain/google-genai'\); const e = new ts.GoogleGenerativeAIEmbeddings\({ apiKey: 'test', model: 'text-embedding-004' }\); console.log\('OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); try { JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/scraped-content.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('scraped-content.json: VALID'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('scraped-content.json ERROR:', e.message\); } try { JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/custom_faq.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('custom_faq.json: VALID'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('custom_faq.json ERROR:', e.message\); }")
